placeholder_abititie.name: atv turbo boost
placeholder_abititie.description: The ATV surges forward at 2× speed for 6 seconds, passing through lighter units without slowing. Excellent for scouting behind enemy lines or escaping danger.

atv_turbo_boost.name: atv turbo boost
atv_turbo_boost.description: The ATV surges forward at 2× speed for <duration> seconds, passing through lighter units without slowing. Excellent for scouting behind enemy lines or escaping danger.

deployable_smoke.name: Deployable Smoke
deployable_smoke.description: Creates a <radius>-meter wide smoke cloud that lasts for <duration> seconds, concealing any units within range.

Frag_Throw.name: Frag Throw
Frag_Throw.description: The Marine hurls a frag grenade at a target location. Deals <damge> AOE damage in a small radius. Effective against grouped infantry and light vehicles.

napalm_burst.name: Napalm Burst
napalm_burst.description: The Flamer douses a target area in ignited fuel. Enemies burn for <damge> damage per second for <duration> seconds. Terrain briefly becomes hazardous.

piercing_shot.name: Piercing Shot
piercing_shot.description: Dead Eyes fires a single armour-piercing round that passes through up to <Pierce> enemies in a straight line, dealing <damge> full damage to each.

rail_shoot.name: Rail gun Shot
rail_shoot.description: unit fires a single armour-piercing round that passes through up to <Pierce> enemies in a straight line, dealing <damge> full damage to each.
